name: Price History Test
description: Test case for retrieving historical price data for a stock through agent interaction

parts.text: Show me the weekly price history for AAPL.

Here is the weekly price history for Apple (AAPL):

The data shows OHLC (open, high, low, close) candlestick records for AAPL over the past week. Each entry includes the opening price, the intraday high and low, the closing price, and trading volume. This data can be used to identify short-term price trends and volatility patterns.

**Note:** This is read-only historical market data. No orders were placed.
